_comment: v0.10 — Pre-built watch-list templates that clone into the editor when a user starts a new watch list. Each template mirrors the shape stored on a real WatchList row (minus DB-only fields like id/ownerId/timestamps). Field ids + operators match the FIELD_REGISTRY in src/lib/watch-list/fields.ts. Note: the field registry only exposes gte/lte/between for numeric fields — 'greater than' templates use 'gte' and 'less than' templates use 'lte' (the closest equivalents; boundary inclusion differs by 1 row at the edge). Decimal-percent fields (concessionRate, listingTrajectoryYoY) store 0..1 — so '20%' = 0.20. Copy convention (v0.16): templates describe the OPERATOR TYPE the criteria capture, not the user's role. No 'acquire / acquirer / acquisition thesis' framing — a watch list can serve any audience that wants to track that operator pattern (analysts, LPs, operators scouting competitors, acquirers, etc).

templates.name: Scale-Density Rollup
templates.tagline: Mid-size SFR independents in growth markets
templates.description: Captures independent SFR property managers with 100-500 doors per market, focused on growth markets with low concession use. Thesis is operational scale and density.

templates.name: Integrated Services Platform
templates.tagline: Larger operators where adjacent service verticals can layer in
templates.description: Captures larger operators with concentrated footprints where adjacent service verticals (construction, insurance, in-house leasing) can be layered in. Thesis is multi-vertical value capture.

templates.name: Mid-Market Independent
templates.tagline: 100-300 door independent operators in growth markets
templates.description: Captures the bread-and-butter independent SFR operator in the 100-300 unit range. Thesis is straightforward roll-up at attractive valuations.

templates.name: Distressed Operator
templates.description: Captures operators with high concession use and declining listing trajectory — indicators of operational stress and possible willingness to sell. Thesis is identifying turnaround candidates below replacement cost.

templates.name: Institutional Platform
templates.description: Captures institutional-scale operators across multiple markets. Thesis is tracking platform-level operators at fund-of-funds scale.
